headline: Investment Firm Criticizes CoStar (CSGP) Financial Transparency
summary: CoStar Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) is among the 10 best non-tech stocks to buy and hold for 5 years. On March 10, the D.E. Shaw group sent an open letter to the CoStar Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) board. In the letter, they criticized the decision of CoStar Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) to reconfigure its reporting segments, expressing concern […]

headline: Bamco Expands FactSet Stake to $838 Million as Financial Data Platform Drives Recurring Revenue
summary: FactSet provides financial data, analytics, and workflow software used by investment professionals worldwide. Because its platform is embedded in research and portfolio-management systems, the company generates recurring subscription revenue tied to the day-to-day operations of investment firms.
